tone: Command-center focus, tactical, precision-oriented, algorithmic trading terminal

layout.container: w-full min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white p-2 md:p-4

surfaces.classes: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-md overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-full

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#0056b3] transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium tracking-wide data-[testid]:true
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 data-[testid]:true
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3D00] text-white hover:bg-[#D50000] transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 data-[testid]:true

cards.default: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 p-5 rounded-md shadow-sm

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/20 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-sm focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF] outline-none transition-all font-mono text-sm w-full data-[testid]:true

charts.tooltip: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 p-3 shadow-lg rounded-sm font-mono text-sm

badges.success: bg-[#00E676]/10 text-[#00E676] border border-[#00E676]/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono rounded-sm
badges.danger: bg-[#FF3D00]/10 text-[#FF3D00] border border-[#FF3D00]/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono rounded-sm
badges.live: bg-[#00E676]/20 text-[#00E676] px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase flex items-center gap-2 rounded-sm
badges.paper: bg-[#FFC107]/20 text-[#FFC107] px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase flex items-center gap-2 rounded-sm

image_urls.description: Close-up candlestick chart, apply heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) to use as background for AI Market Insights panel to give it depth.
Ethereum and Bitcoin coins image, apply black gradient overlay, use behind the top Portfolio Balance section.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the layout as a dense, control-room style grid (Grid Borders strategy) with minimal padding between major widgets. Avoid 'card-heavy' looks in favor of a cohesive panel feel.
Ensure 'JetBrains Mono' is used for ALL numbers, pricing data, percentages, and logs.
Ensure 'IBM Plex Sans' is used for headers and descriptive text.
In the Main Chart section, implement real-time feeling candlestick or line charts using Recharts.
In the AI Market Insights panel, use the `ai_insights_bg` image with a very heavy dark overlay so the text remains high-contrast.
The layout should consist of a Top Nav/Status Bar (Mode Toggle, General Stats), Main Chart (Large), Bot Control & Settings panel, Live Signals Feed, and Trade History table at the bottom.
Use data-testid attributes on every button, input, tab, and toggle for testing.
The primary action color is #007AFF, but use #00E676 and #FF3D00 strictly for financial up/down states.
